title: Academic Faculty
content:
MORGAN STATE UNIVERSITY COMPUTER SCIENCE FACULTY

Dr. Amjad Ali - Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 502
Email: amjad.ali@morgan.edu
Research: cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, critical infrastructure security, security policy and privacy, BYOD security, smart cities security, mobile security, cloud security.

Dr. Radhouane Chouchane (Radwan Shushane) - Associate Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 624
Phone: (443) 885-3745
Email: Radwan.Shushane@morgan.edu
Research: explainable artificial intelligence and machine learning to detect malicious cyber activities.

Dr. Monireh Dabaghchian - Associate Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 508
Phone: (443) 885-2348
Email: Monireh.Dabaghchian@morgan.edu
Research: cybersecurity, IoT security, cyber-physical systems security, privacy in spectrum-sharing networks, online learning algorithms, deep learning.

Dr. Jamell Dacon - Assistant Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 625
Email: jamell.dacon@morgan.edu
Research: artificial intelligence, machine learning, computational social science, natural language processing, fairness and bias in AI/ML/NLP, human-computer interaction, data science for social good, AI in education and healthcare.



Dr. Jin Guo - Professor of Practice
Office: McMechen Hall 502
Email: jin.guo@morgan.edu
Research: cloud computing, enterprise IT architecture, IT management.

Dr. Vahid Heydari - Associate Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 619
Email: vahid.heydari@morgan.edu
Research: moving target defense, security and privacy in industrial control systems, wireless networks, wearable medical devices, IoT, malware analysis, machine learning, zero-trust architectures.

Dr. Naja Mack - Assistant Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 623
Lab: McMechen Hall 616
Phone: (443) 885-2402
Email: Naja.Mack@morgan.edu
Research: human-centered computing, AI, machine learning, adaptive learning technologies, conversational user interfaces, CS education, virtual reality, robotics.

Dr. Jianzhou Mao  - Research Assistant Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 627
Email: jianzhou.mao@morgan.edu
Research: machine learning, deep learning, AI applications in big data analytics and optimization, quantum computing, cybersecurity.

Dr. Blessing Ojeme - Assistant Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 621
Email: blessing.ojeme@morgan.edu
Research: artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, image processing, computer vision, bioinformatics, human-computer interaction.

Dr. Roshan Paudel - Coordinator of MS in Bioinformatics Program, Professor of Practice
Office: McMechen Hall 507D
Phone: (443) 885-3096
Email: Roshan.Paudel@morgan.edu
Research: high-performance computing, bioinformatics, next-generation sequencing analysis, computational biology.

Dr. Eric Sakk - Associate Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 507F
Phone: (443) 885-3270
Email: Eric.Sakk@morgan.edu
Research: dynamical systems, machine learning, quantum computing, system theory, computer systems, communications systems, bioinformatics.

Dr. Vojislav Stojkovic - Associate Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 507E
Phone: (443) 885-1054
Email: Vojislav.Stojkovic@morgan.edu
Research: bioinformatics, cybersecurity, information assurance, artificial intelligence, formal languages, programming languages, quantum and DNA computing, data science.

Dr. Timothy Oladunni - Assistant Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 617
Email: Timothy.Oladunni@morgan.edu
Research: artificial intelligence, natural language processing, computer vision, data science, pattern recognition.

Dr. Guobin Xu - Associate Professor
Office: McMechen Hall 615
Email: guobin.xu@morgan.edu
Research: machine learning, computer vision, quantum security , robotics, intelligent systems for healthcare.
